title: KZ-2B record KZ-2
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
tasks = queue.get('tasks', [])
if not any(t.get('id') == 'KZ-2' for t in tasks):
    tasks.append({'id':'KZ-2','title':'Eliminate SSOT duplicates','status':'DONE','priority':1,'touch_workflows':False})
if not any(t.get('id') == 'KZ-4' for t in tasks):
    tasks.append({'id':'KZ-4','title':'Next active roadmap task after KZ-2','status':'PENDING','priority':2,'depends_on':['KZ-2'],'criteria':'Execute next queue item provided by updated roadmap','touch_workflows':False})
for task in tasks:
    if task.get('id') == 'KZ-2':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = 'f8b05038f90935ae6d9d1efc3dadf116589a444b'
        task['inventory_sha'] = '93ed838d8e885069ea634154f3ee240b5170c70e'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:04:50Z'
    if task.get('id') == 'KZ-4' and task.get('status') != 'DONE':
        task['status'] = 'PENDING'
queue['tasks'] = tasks
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:06:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'HAS_PENDING_TASKS'
queue['next_action'] = 'execute first PENDING task: KZ-4'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T15:04:50Z','id':'KZ-2','trace_id':'kz2_eliminate_ssot_duplicates','sha':'f8b05038f90935ae6d9d1efc3dadf116589a444b','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing += line + '\n'
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/KZ2B_RECORD_KZ2_ACTIVATE_KZ4.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'KZ-2B','trace_id':'kz2b_record_kz2_activate_kz4','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'recorded_step':'KZ-2','recorded_sha':'f8b05038f90935ae6d9d1efc3dadf116589a444b','activated':'KZ-4','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'KZ-4'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/KZ2B_RECORD_KZ2_ACTIVATE_KZ4.md')
report.write_text('# KZ-2B | Record KZ-2 and activate KZ-4\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nKZ-2 recorded as DONE with SHA f8b05038f90935ae6d9d1efc3dadf116589a444b. KZ-4 is PENDING in governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json. Workflow lock respected.\n\nNext: KZ-4.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
